{{Infobox event
| name = Akura Matriarch's message
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Akura Matriarch]] left a message for [[Eithan]] stating she will defend his empire from a rising fiend once, and that he must raise protectors to defend against a great calamity.}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
